xBRIEFInfo.author: agent:cursor
xBRIEFInfo.description: Scope xBRIEF for an About popup with app blurb and copyright

plan.title: Add an About popup with app blurb and copyright

narratives.Overview: Add an 'About' popup (modal/dialog) to the Relaxanator PWA that briefly describes the app and shows a copyright line '(c) Jirius Group LLC' at the bottom. A small, unobtrusive 'About' trigger (e.g. a button/link in the app header or footer) opens the popup; the popup can be dismissed (close button, backdrop click, and Escape). The blurb should concisely describe what the app does: an offline-capable PWA that generates EQ-shaped colored noise (brown/pink/white) alongside scheduled meditation sounds, chord ambiences, and break prompts to help the user focus, relax, and rest.
narratives.Requirements: FR-1: Add an 'About' trigger control in the app UI (header or footer area of the main NoisePlayer layout) that is clearly discoverable but unobtrusive. FR-2: Clicking the trigger opens an About popup/modal overlay describing the app in a short blurb (1-3 short sentences / small paragraph). FR-3: The popup shows a copyright line at the bottom reading exactly '© Jirius Group LLC' (render the copyright symbol; '(c)' as authored is acceptable to display as ©). Including the current year is optional — if included, keep it simple (e.g. '© 2026 Jirius Group LLC'); the operator only specified '(c) Jirius Group LLC', so at minimum that text must appear. FR-4: The popup is dismissible via a visible close (X/Close) button, clicking the backdrop, and pressing Escape; focus handling should be reasonable (return focus to trigger on close). FR-5: Accessible: dialog has role/aria attributes and an accessible name; trigger is a real button. NFR-1: Match the app's existing visual style/CSS approach (see src/app/globals.css and existing panels/components) — no heavy new dependencies; use the project's existing React/CSS patterns. NFR-2: Works offline (no external network/assets) consistent with the PWA. NFR-3: A co-located component test (forward-coverage gate #1310) covering render + open/close behavior; typecheck, lint, full test suite, and production build pass. NFR-4: Purely additive UI — no changes to audio engines or existing panel behavior.
narratives.Assumptions: A-1: The About content is static (no data fetching). A-2: Implement as a React component (e.g. src/components/AboutDialog.tsx) wired into the main layout (src/components/NoisePlayer.tsx) with styles in src/app/globals.css, following existing component/CSS conventions. The implementer may choose the exact placement of the trigger (header vs footer) — pick what fits the existing layout best and note the choice. A-3: The blurb wording can be lightly refined by the implementer for tone/fit as long as it accurately describes the app (noise + meditation + chords + breaks, offline PWA) and the copyright line is present.

items.title: Create src/components/AboutDialog.tsx — accessible modal with app blurb + '© Jirius Group LLC' footer, dismissible (button/backdrop/Escape)

narrative.Traces: FR-2, FR-3, FR-4, FR-5, NFR-1, NFR-2, NFR-4

items.title: Wire an 'About' trigger into src/components/NoisePlayer.tsx layout (header/footer)
Add About/dialog styles to src/app/globals.css matching existing style
Add co-located AboutDialog test (render + open/close); verify gates/coverage/build
